banned_tokens.message: change-narration in a doc body; docs state present reality only (git holds history). Rephrase, or add <!-- docs-lint: allow --> if this legitimately describes an external/deprecated thing.

possible change-narration; if this states present reality (e.g. 'wait no longer than'), ignore, otherwise rephrase to present tense. Advisory (non-blocking) because it collides with legitimate present-state prose.
possible change-narration; documenting a currently-deprecated external API is present reality, so this is advisory (non-blocking). Rephrase if it narrates a change to abcd itself.
possible change-narration; 'records migrated from X are validated' is present-state provenance, so this is advisory (non-blocking). Rephrase if it narrates a one-off migration event.
